name: Spinach Roll
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp chopped basil (I used the dry kind)
recipeInstructions:
1. Nuke the spinach for 5 minutes on high.
2. While the spinach is nuking, sauté the garlic in a skillet.
3. Once the spinach is done, add it to the skillet along with the bread crumbs, Parmesan, pepper, and basil.
4. When most of the water has evaporated, cut the phyllo sheets in half.
5. Lay down one sheet, sprayed lightly, then another sheet, sprayed again, until four half sheets are down.
6. Place 1/5 of the spinach mixture on a sheet, add a tablespoon of ricotta and a teaspoon of mozzarella.
7. Roll it up, spray lightly, and repeat for the next roll.
8. Bake until golden at about 350 degrees. The rolls turned out pretty good too.
